ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age_at_initial_diagnosis" REAL /* Age of the patient at initial diagnosis */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was diagnosed */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the patient */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption habits of the patient */,
  "family_history_of_cancer" TEXT /* Family history of cancer */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Other medical conditions of the patient */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information for follow-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tumor_types" (
  "tumor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tumor type */,
  "tumor_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the tumor type (e.g., Serous, Endometrioid) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tumor type */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade of the tumor */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Stage of the tumor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tumor in the body */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tumor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the response */,
  "tumor_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tumor type associated with the patient */,
  "response_group" TEXT /* Group classification of the patient's response (e.g., Good, Poor) */,
  "p_value" REAL /* Statistical p-value indicating significance of the response */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment associated with the response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was observed */,
  "detailed_response" TEXT /* Detailed description of the response */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the next follow-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_tumor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("tumor_type_id") REFERENCES tumor_types ("tumor_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical trial */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinical trial */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the clinical trial */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the clinical trial */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the clinical trial */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "research_team" TEXT /* Members of the research team */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Sources of funding */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Publication status (e.g., Published, In Review) */,
  "publication_link" TEXT /* Link to the published results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tumor_responses" (
  "tumor_response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tumor response record */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinical trial */,
  "tumor_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tumor type */,
  "total_patients" INTEGER /* Total number of patients in this category */,
  "good_response" INTEGER /* Number of good responses */,
  "poor_response" INTEGER /* Number of poor responses */,
  "average_response_time" REAL /* Average time for a response to be observed */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Overall response rate */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the response rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tumor_response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tumor_responses_tumor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("tumor_type_id") REFERENCES tumor_types ("tumor_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tumor_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES clinical_trials ("trial_id")
)
